title: Freestanding build artifact hygiene
goal: Keep generated freestanding, QEMU, and build-kernel artifacts out of tracked source while preserving the commands needed to reproduce them.
next_actions: Audit generated artifacts produced by focused platform builds.
Patch ignore rules only for generated files, not source or manifests.
Document the expected build output locations.
acceptance: Focused platform builds do not leave unrelated untracked artifacts.
Tracked assembly, linker scripts, manifests, and docs remain visible to git.
The implementation workflow names the relevant build directories.
